name: Seneca Financial Corp.
summary: Seneca Financial Corp. operates as the holding company for Seneca Federal Savings and Loan Association, a community-oriented savings and loan institution, which primarily accepts deposits from customers within its market area and invests those funds in residential mortgage loans. It provides demand, NOW, savings, money market, and certificate of deposit accounts; and one-to-four family first lien residential, residential construction, home equity loans and lines of credit, and commercial real estate mortgage loans, as well as commercial and industrial, and consumer loans. The company also offers asset management, financial planning, and investment advisory services; and sells various insurance and investment products through broker networks. It operates two branches in Liverpool and North Syracuse, New York. The company is headquartered in Baldwinsville, New York. Seneca Financial Corp. is a subsidiary of Seneca Financial MHC.
